prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-THRWKNIVES6.5-3PC-BLK Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical 6pc Martial Arts 6.5" Throwing Knives Set with Webbing Wrapped Handle, Black Dragon Description: Practice and perfect your martial arts skills with this 6pc authentic style japanese throwing knife set.

Carefully balanced with the center of gravity in the middle of the knives, these blades will make even, round circles in flight. The single-edged cord-wrapped blades will give you the option to grip them from either the handle or the blade side, and allow for more variation in throwing techniques.

The 440 stainless steel construction will keep these knives in great condition through many practice sessions. The solid piece of steel from tip to handle ensures you wont have to worry about losing rivets or parts of the handle if you accidentally hit a hard object in practice.

Included is a reinforced nylon sheath that will hold all your knives. The sheath even includes a belt loop for easy transportation. Each knife has its own compartment, so you'll be able to keep them separate to resist dulling and help maintain the finish. Search Terms: throwing knives carrying case black martial arts ninja Features: - Japanese style authentic kunai throwing knives with finger ring - Overall Length: 6.5 Inch; Blade Length: 3.25 Inch; Handle Length: 3.25 Inch; Weight: 2oz each - Full tang 440 stainless steel with webbing wrapped handle - Color: Black - Includes reinforced nylon sheath === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 6-pk 6.5" Black Throwing Knives Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Japanese Style Kunai, Full Tang 440 Stainless Steel, Webbing Wrapped Handle, Includes Nylon Sheath With Belt Loop

openai.title_differentiation: Japanese Style Kunai, Full Tang 440 Stainless Steel, Web-Wrapped Handles, Finger Ring, Nylon Sheath
